panel_reviews.kill_argument: The actionable-uncertainty mechanism is partly undercut by diagnostics showing weak or redundant uncertainty/risk terms; the current manuscript survives only under the scoped same-candidate ranking plus reliability-stratification claim.
Performance may be driven more by calibrated posterior/ranking setup than by the full uncertainty decomposition, but the manuscript mostly neutralizes this with scope guards.
Actionable uncertainty remains the strongest mechanism-scope attack; stronger component-necessity language would reopen rejection risk.

blocking_issues_before_local_fixes: ProMax final ACM page range and ACM/Crossref registry visibility remain a pre-submission metadata blocker.
ProEx ACM-visible metadata should be checked immediately before submission because Crossref returned 404 in this environment.
The method text did not name the exact calibration source/rule for p_i.
The framework figure was included from ../outputs rather than from the paper source package.
Small LaTeX overfull/underfull warnings remain presentation-polish items.
fixes_applied_in_this_pass: Clarified that p_i is the paper-facing schema field calibrated_relevance_probability consumed by the scorer; no new post-hoc calibrator is fitted on test rows.
Clarified that validation controls select score family, weights, and eta, while the raw-versus-calibrated gap is an uncertainty term.
Copied framework_overview.pdf and framework_overview.svg into Paper/figures/ and changed the manuscript include path to figures/framework_overview.pdf.
Recompiled after soft-wrapping the calibrated_relevance_probability field to remove the new large overfull warning.
remaining_blockers_after_local_fixes: ProMax final ACM page range and ACM/Crossref registry visibility must be rechecked immediately before submission.
ProEx ACM-visible metadata should be rechecked immediately before submission because Crossref returned 404 in this environment.
A superseding final signoff should not set final_submission_ready=true until the metadata cautions are closed.
Small LaTeX overfull/underfull warnings remain as final PDF polish, though no undefined citation/reference or BibTeX blocker remains.
